creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Can you confirm that you have the uptodate ports tree?

One more thing is it looks like there are some files being used from the old version of tex. If you look at the errors and my log files you can differentiate better.

In any case I would advise removing all tex ports and removing the folder manually /usr/local/share/tex* and then reinstalling as this is difficult to debug.
